passive.name: Thalassophobia
passive.description: Kadita gains the Blessing of the Ocean every 30s. The Blessing is triggered when she takes damage from enemy heroes and lasts 4s, allowing her to recover 65% of the HP lost within the duration afterward.

skill1.name: Ocean Ode
skill1.description:
Kadita summons an ocean wave to carry her in the target direction and back, dealing 250 (+90% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and slow them by 30%. While inside the wave, she gains Control Immunity and 50% Damage Reduction when inside the wave. This skill can pass through obstacles and terrain.
Use Again: Kadita exits the wave without interrupting the wave's movement.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=9.0/8.5/8.0/7.5/7.0/6.5
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=55/60/65/70/75/80
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=250/290/330/370/410/450

skill2.name: Breath of the Ocean
skill2.description:
After a short delay, Kadita summons an ocean wave to erupt at the target location, dealing 350 (+140% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and knocking them airborne for 1s.
Kadita can cast this skill during Ocean Ode to summon an ocean wave beneath her with a shorter eruption delay.
|stats1=Skill Cost|stats1_value=75/80/85/90/95/100
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=350/380/410/440/470/500

ultimate.name: Rough Waves
ultimate.description:
Kadita dives into the ground and sends ocean waves in all directions (this skill can only be interrupted by Suppression), each dealing 270 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 30%. Enemies hit by multiple waves take increased damage. After a short period, the waves return to Kadita, each dealing 180 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit.
When underground, Kadita becomes untargetable and gains 60% Movement Speed.
|quote=Seas and oceans take orders from me!
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=40.0/36.0/32.0
|stats2=Skill Cost|stats2_value=120/150/180
|stats3=Base Damage|stats3_value=270/300/330
|stats4=Return Damage|stats4_value=180/200/220
